title: SINT Approval Request Message
description: Emitted on the approvals WebSocket / SSE stream when a T2_ACT or T3_COMMIT request has been escalated and awaits human review. Corresponds to the APPROVAL_REQUIRED event in apps/gateway-server/src/ws/ws-approval-stream.ts.

requestId.description: UUID v7 identifier of the intercepted SINT request.

agentId.description: Ed25519 public key of the agent (hex-encoded, 64 chars).

resource.description: Resource the agent is attempting to act on (e.g. ros2:///cmd_vel, mcp://filesystem/writeFile).

action.description: Action requested against the resource (e.g. publish, write, delete).

tier.description: Approval tier that triggered escalation. Only T2+ tiers generate APPROVAL_REQUIRED events.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the escalation decision was made.

replay.description: True if this event was replayed to a newly-connected subscriber (via ?cursor= or ?since= query params). Absent/false for live events.
